reference: Hello, actually your stone has come out of the kidney but is impacted in the ureters, which are two tubes carrying urine from the kidney to the bladder. Don't take a chance by delaying; get urgent surgery or laser to have it removed as soon as possible.
text: Hello—actually, your "stone" has come out of the kidney but is impacted in the ureters, which are two tubes carrying urine from the kidney to the bladder. Don't take a chance by delaying; get urgent surgery or laser to have it removed as soon as possible.
